channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Australia Passes World-First Social Media Ban for Children Under 16
item.description: The Australian government has passed a law banning children under the age of 16 from using social media, sparking controversy and debate over online safety.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Who needs wall sockets? DJI's powerful new expansion battery lands to give you an 11kWh setup for charging drones and more
item.description: The DJI Power Expansion Battery 2000 is here, and you can daisy-chain loads of them together – for an eye-watering price.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Future of Tech in LATAM: A Region on the Rise
item.description: LATAM's tech ecosystem is growing, driven by a surge in skilled professionals, sector diversity, and geographic diversity. The region's future looks promising, with government investments, cultural shifts, and strategic advantages.
item.dc:creator: Nacho De Marco, Fast Company

item.title: I'm a PlayStation expert and these are the best Black Friday PS5 deals I've ever seen
item.description: I'm gathering together all the best Black Friday PS5 deals and PS5 Pro discounts that I can spot in this year's sales.
item.dc:creator: rob.dwiar@futurenet.com (Rob Dwiar), TechRadar

item.title: Desperate to see Nvidia’s RTX 5090? A graphics card maker rep just accidentally revealed that next-gen flagship GPU will be unveiled at CES 2025
item.description: The rumor mill seems increasingly sure that the RTX 5090 will muscle onto the graphics card scene at CES 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Communication Networks Hit Hard by Valencia Storm
item.description: The recent storm in Valencia has left a trail of destruction, including significant damage to communication networks. Mobile operators MasOrange, Vodafone, and Telefónica were affected, with some experiencing outages of up to 30% of their fixed network and 22% of their mobile network.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: SAFe certification: Launch your Scaled Agile Framework career
item.description: What is SAFe certification? Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) certifications are becoming valuable in larger organizations looking for efficient project delivery, reduced time-to-market, and ways to provide better stakeholder value.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Australian Parliament bans social media for under-16s with world-first law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A social media ban for children under 16 passed the Australian Parliament on Friday in a world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Swipe right on data privacy: What tech companies can learn about consent from dating apps
item.description: I’ve been in the data privacy field for over 15 years, but nothing could prepare me for the complications and complexities that AI has created for companies since it hit the mainstream in 2022.
item.dc:creator: Ron De Jesus, Fast Company

item.title: 10+ tips and services for new Bluesky users
item.description: For the past two or three weeks, upstart social network Bluesky has been attracting large numbers of new users every day, a crowd that quite evidently includes many Apple device users — the app has at times topped Apple’s App Store charts in the run-up to Thanksgiving in the US.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: For Black Friday deals, these 3 sites are all you need
item.description: I’m in my mid-forties. Things are going gray in places and my hips hurt for no reason. And back in my day, Black Friday was one day: the Friday after Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Windows 11: A guide to the updates
item.description: A Windows launch isn’t the end a process — it’s really just the beginning. Microsoft continually works on improving Windows 11 by fixing bugs, releasing security patches, and occasionally adding new features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Majority of social media influencers share information without verifying its accuracy: UN report
item.description: The majority of social media influencers share information with their followers without verifying its accuracy, according to a new U.N. report that was released on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 10 ways AI can make farmers’ jobs easier
item.description: For those who work the earth, AI can be an invaluable tool for making that work more efficient, sustainable and productive. AI helps farmers use the same tools they have been using for centuries, but with improved efficiency and focus.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: Influencer houses are dead. Welcome to the production studio era
item.description: Influencers today look a lot more like Hollywood executives than ragtag social media users. And they’re buying up the real estate to prove it. A slew of creators have been buying plots of studio land to film and edit their content.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Julius is a great AI tool for analyzing and visualizing datasets
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. Julius is a promising new AI service for analyzing data.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cerebras claims record in molecular dynamics simulations, says it’s 748x faster than Frontier supercomputer
item.description: Cerebras Systems, the maker of an AI “chip” the size of a pizza box, is making some impressive claims about its AI processing performance. At the recent Supercomputing 24 show, Cerebras announced a breakthrough in molecular dynamics simulations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Stanford prof accused of using AI to fake testimony in Minnesota case against conservative YouTuber
item.description: Jeff Hancock, an expert on AI and misinformation, has been accused of fabricating an expert declaration by citing a study that was allegedly made up by AI.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, ABC 4
